description:
2019 Ferrari 488 Spider, 3.8L V8, RWD, 661bhp, 7 Speed Dual Clutch Automatic. AED 1,059,000 or AED 16,591 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 7,937 KM - Ferrari Warranty valid until January 2027 (extendable) - Comes with 2 Keys - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Giallo Triplo Strato - Adaptive Frontlight System - Yellow Brake Calipers - Carbon Fibre Rear Air-Ducts - Carbon Fibre Fog Lamp - Carbon Fibre B-Post Trim - Carbon Fibre Under-Door Covers - Carbon Fibre Driver Zone + LEDs - Carbon Fibre Central Bridge - Exterior Sill kicks in Carbon Fibre - Cavallino Stitched on Headrests - Sport Exhaust System - Additional Coloured Mats with Logo - Heat Insulating Front Windscreen - 'Scuderia Ferrari' Shields - Interior and Exterior Electrochromic Mirrors - Front and Rear Parking Cameras - Front and Rear Parking Sensors - Passenger Display - 20" Dark Painted Rims - Yellow Rev. Counter - Goldrake Racing Seats (Carbon - Large Size) - Premium High-Fi System - Coloured Special Stitching - Upper Part of Passenger Compartment in Alcantara
